---

**Subject:** Verify Your Account Details – Important Security Update

---

**Dear [Customer Name],**

We recently noticed unusual activity on your account and want to ensure your information is up to date for continued secure access.

To protect your account, please verify your details by clicking the button below:

[**Verify My Account**]

This simple step will help us confirm your identity and ensure your account remains secure. If you did not request this verification, please contact our customer support team immediately at [Phone Number] or [Email Address].

Thank you for being a valued customer at [Bank Name].

Sincerely,  
[Your Name]  
[Your Position]  
[Bank Name]  
[Bank Contact Information]

---
